description:
A Git client for simultaneous branches on top of your existing workflow.


## Changes
- Reverts the change in the file pre-selecting default behavior when starting a commit (introduced in 0.15.13). 
- You can now configure what files are auto-staged when starting a commit (under Settings -> Appearance): Stage all (default), Stage selected, Stage none
